blocks.name: Hong Kong · Central
blocks.source: OpenStreetMap buildings and building:part via Overpass API; heights use OSM height/building:levels/min_height when available, otherwise a conservative fallback.

dem.source: Mapzen Terrarium DEM tiles (AWS elevation-tiles-prod), normalized by subtracting the local median elevation; no-data ocean outliers are treated as sea level.
